🎯 My Queue 0

Add Lead

⬇ Import Call List (CSV)

DMS-only pool — these contacts never appear in the sales Leads tab. Upload a .csv file, or paste data below. Full CSV with a header row works (recognized columns: business/name, address, city, state, zip, phone, website, chamber/source) — or just a plain list of business names, one per line, no header needed.

🌎 Harvest Google Maps

Pulls businesses from Google Maps into the DMS cold-call pool. Anything already an account, lead, contact, or already on the call list is skipped automatically. Costs Outscraper credits per record returned — capped server-side at $3/day (≈1,000 records), resetting at midnight Eastern.

Weekly Gap Review — Owner Action Items
📞

Call Top 3 Open Quotes

Fairless Hills Retirement ($18.4K), Shore Memorial ($22.8K), and Bucks County Schools ($14.2K) have not accepted deficiency repair quotes past 5 days.

🔁

Cross-Sell Account Review

6 GTO-only clients have no Chemical supply agreement. Termac attachment rate target is 60%. Each conversion = ~$220/mo RMR.

⏱️

Report Delivery Audit

Techs B, D, and F averaging 6.2hr report delivery. Review if reports are being generated manually. Automation should bring this to <1hr.

🗺️

Driver D Route Review

Driver D trending at 61% wrench time this week vs 72% fleet average. Pull route log to identify excessive transit between stops.

✅

GTO Compliance — On Track

94% compliance cert delivery rate. 6 missed intervals flagged and assigned. No NFPA liability exposure this week.

💰

Revenue Ahead of Target

$1.24M MTD vs $1.10M target (+12.7%). UniPro and GTO leading. Filter Man slightly behind — 4 route completions pending.

Profitability Leak Detector — Operational Vital Signs

🔥 UniPro / Quality III — Fire Protection

Target vs Danger threshold
First-Time Fix Rate
Repairs completed in one trip · Every return trip = double transit + lost trust
🟡 Yellow: <83%  |  🔴 Red: <80%
84%
Deficiency-to-Quote Time
Hours from deficiency identified to quote issued · Fire hazards = liability exposure every hour
🟡 Yellow: 36–48hrs  |  🔴 Red: >48hrs
42 hrs
Deficiency Conversion Rate
Identified deficiencies → paid repair invoices
🟡 Yellow: 45–48%  |  🔴 Red: <45%
41%
ITM Renewal Rate
Recurring contracts renewed at term · Floor of the business
🟡 Yellow: 85–88%  |  🔴 Red: <85%
87%
Wrench Time Utilization
Billable on-site hours vs total hours worked
🟡 Yellow: 65–67%  |  🔴 Red: <65%
72%

🔩 AllPro Stainless — Fabrication

Shop floor vitals
Material Usage Variance
Actual vs estimated stainless steel usage · Every % over = margin gone
🟡 Yellow: 3–5%  |  🔴 Red: >5%
3.1%
Rework Rate
Jobs requiring correction due to fabrication errors · Most expensive cost in the shop
🟡 Yellow: 1.5–2%  |  🔴 Red: >2%
2.4%
Job Margin Variance (Est vs Actual)
Budget overrun across active fabrication jobs
🟡 Yellow: 3–5% over  |  🔴 Red: >5% over
-8.4%
Throughput Rate
Production vs 3-month rolling average · Drop signals shop bottleneck
🟡 Yellow: -7 to -10% vs avg  |  🔴 Red: >-10%
-3%
On-Time Delivery Rate
Projects completed by committed date
🟡 Yellow: 80–85%  |  🔴 Red: <80%
82%

🏢 Cross-Divisional — All Entities

Owner-level financial vitals
Cash-to-Cash Cycle
Days between paying labor/materials and receiving client payment · Kills working capital
🟡 Yellow: 37–45 days  |  🔴 Red: >45 days
38 days
Days Sales Outstanding (DSO)
Average days to collect on invoices
🟡 Yellow: 28–35 days  |  🔴 Red: >35 days
32 days
Cross-Service Penetration
Average services per client across the family
🟡 Yellow: 2.3–2.5  |  🔴 Red: <2.3
2.1

Hood suppression — semi-annual

How are you here today?
Select the visit type to get started.
📅
Appointment Scheduled in advance
🚶
Blind Site Visit Stopped in, no appointment
Elevator Pitch
Tap each line as you deliver it. Advance when you're ready.

⚡ 30-Second Introduction

Hi, I'm Ted from Termac — we're a family of fire protection, kitchen, and facilities service companies covering the area.
We handle fire extinguisher inspections and kitchen suppression systems through UniPro, hood filter exchange through Filter Man, and grease trap service through G.T.O.
We also do custom stainless steel fabrication for commercial kitchens through ALLPro — tables, back walls, shelving — built and installed on-site.
And Termac handles dish machine service, commercial chemicals, and paper supplies — essentially everything a kitchen needs from one family of companies.
Most of our customers use us for two or three services. Can I take 5 minutes to show you exactly what we cover here?
Line 1 of 5

Hood Suppression — NFPA 96

Fire Extinguishers — NFPA 10
Inspection ItemStatusNotes
🪧 Compliance Signage Check
NFPA 10 requires a visible location/inspection sign above each extinguisher. Use the checkbox on each unit above to mark which units are missing one — quantities needed for signs, rubber caps, and metal caps are entered on the pricing screen (next).
🚨
Emergency / Exit Lighting — NFPA 101
📷 AI Camera Protocol: Photograph each unit. AI analyzes for painted-over lenses, cracked housing, failed illumination, and missing covers.
Inspection ItemStatusNotes

Schedule & Notes
Scheduling Note: A member of our scheduling team will contact the client directly to confirm the first available date and time. No date entry needed here.
✍️ Client Acceptance
Review the estimate with the client, then have them sign below to confirm they wish to proceed.
⚖️ Estimate Disclaimer — Client Initials Required
IMPORTANT NOTICE REGARDING SCOPE AND PRICING: The pricing set forth in this estimate constitutes an estimate based upon conditions observed during the initial compliance walkthrough conducted by Universal Fire Protection. This estimate is not a final or guaranteed price. The parties acknowledge and agree that the total amount due may be adjusted following the technician's on-site service visit to reflect actual findings, including but not limited to: (i) additional deficiencies identified during the service visit that were not observable during the walkthrough; (ii) additional parts, materials, or labor required to bring all systems into full compliance with applicable NFPA standards; (iii) corrections necessitated by conditions that were concealed, inaccessible, or not apparent at the time of the initial assessment. Universal Fire Protection shall notify the client of any material price adjustment prior to performing additional work. Client acknowledges that inspection fees, compliance fees, and the site visit fee are non-refundable once service has been initiated.
By initialing, client confirms they have read, understand, and agree to the estimate disclaimer above. Initials are required before signing.
✍️

🌬️ Filter Man — Hood Filter Survey
Take a photo of the full hood width. AI will count filters and estimate sizing.

📷 AI Filter Analysis

Stand back so the full hood is visible. Include the hood width in frame. AI will count filter slots and estimate standard sizes.

📷
Tap to take / upload photo Full hood width · straight-on · good lighting

🪣 G.T.O. — Grease Trap Survey
Take a photo of the trap lid with a reference object. AI estimates gallonage.

📷 AI Trap Sizing

Place a tape measure, boot, or hand near the lid for scale. AI will estimate trap size and pump frequency.

📷
Tap to take / upload photo Trap lid · reference object in frame · top-down angle

Fire Extinguishers

🧴 Termac — Dish Machine & Chemical Program
For new installations: use the AI Advisor to size the machine, configure the layout, and build the full chemical program. Equipment selection and supplies are below.

New Installation — Dish Machine Sizing

Photo the space, enter dimensions and restaurant info → AI sizes the machine, sets left/right configuration, recommends table dimensions, and builds the full chemical program including pot sink.

⚖️ Estimate Disclaimer — Client Initials Required
IMPORTANT NOTICE REGARDING SCOPE AND PRICING: The pricing set forth in this estimate constitutes an estimate based upon conditions observed during the initial compliance walkthrough conducted by Universal Fire Protection. This estimate is not a final or guaranteed price. The parties acknowledge and agree that the total amount due may be adjusted following the technician's on-site service visit to reflect actual findings, including but not limited to: (i) additional deficiencies identified during the service visit that were not observable during the walkthrough; (ii) additional parts, materials, or labor required to bring all systems into full compliance with applicable NFPA standards; (iii) corrections necessitated by conditions that were concealed, inaccessible, or not apparent at the time of the initial assessment. Universal Fire Protection shall notify the client of any material price adjustment prior to performing additional work. Client acknowledges that inspection fees, compliance fees, and the site visit fee are non-refundable once service has been initiated.
By initialing, client confirms they have read, understand, and agree to the disclaimer above. Required before the estimate can be built.

❌ Not Interested — Log Reason
`); w.document.close(); setTimeout(()=>w.print(), 800); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // SERVICE SCHEDULING QUEUE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function opsRenderSchedulingQueue() { const body = document.getElementById('opsSchedulingBody'); if (!body) return; const accounts = crmLoad('accounts').filter(a => a.status === 'active'); const events = (() => { try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('termac_scheduler_events')||'[]'); } catch(e) { return []; } })(); const scheduled = new Set(events.map(e => e.accountId).filter(Boolean)); const today = new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); const rows = []; accounts.forEach(a => { const _dueDate = a.renewalDate || a.nextDue || null; const renewalDays = _dueDate ? Math.floor((new Date(_dueDate) - today) / 86400000) : null; const lastService = a.lastCheckin ? Math.floor((Date.now() - a.lastCheckin) / 86400000) : null; const isScheduled = scheduled.has(a.id); let urgency=null, urgencyColor='', urgencyBg=''; if (renewalDays !== null && renewalDays <= 0) { urgency='OVERDUE'; urgencyColor='#991B1B'; urgencyBg='#FEE2E2'; } else if (renewalDays !== null && renewalDays <= 14) { urgency=`DUE IN ${renewalDays}d`; urgencyColor='#C8102E'; urgencyBg='#FEE2E2'; } else if (renewalDays !== null && renewalDays <= 45) { urgency=`DUE IN ${renewalDays}d`; urgencyColor='#D97706'; urgencyBg='#FEF3C7'; } else if (lastService !== null && lastService > 90 && !isScheduled) { urgency=`${lastService}d NO VISIT`; urgencyColor='#1E40AF'; urgencyBg='#DBEAFE'; } if (!urgency) return; rows.push({ a, urgency, urgencyColor, urgencyBg, isScheduled }); }); rows.sort((a,b) => { const o={'#991B1B':0,'#C8102E':1,'#D97706':2,'#1E40AF':3}; return (o[a.urgencyColor]||9)-(o[b.urgencyColor]||9); }); if (!rows.length) { body.innerHTML='
✅ No scheduling gaps — all active accounts are current.
'; return; } body.innerHTML = rows.map(({a,urgency,urgencyColor,urgencyBg,isScheduled}) => `
${escH(a.name||a.business||'')}
${escH(a.address||'')}
${urgency}
${(a.services||[]).join(', ')||'—'}
${escH(a.assignedRep||a.rep||'Unassigned')}
${isScheduled ? '✓ Sched' : ''}
`).join(''); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // NEW ACCOUNT ONBOARDING QUEUE // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ const OB_STEPS = [ { key:'agreementSigned', label:'Agreement Signed', icon:'📝' }, { key:'squareOnFile', label:'Square / Payment on File', icon:'💳' }, { key:'firstJobScheduled', label:'First Job Scheduled', icon:'📅' }, { key:'firstServiceDone', label:'First Service Complete', icon:'✅' }, { key:'certIssued', label:'Cert Issued', icon:'🏅' }, { key:'rep30dCheckin', label:'Rep 30-Day Check-In', icon:'🤝' }, ]; function opsRenderOnboardingQueue() { const body = document.getElementById('opsOnboardingBody'); if (!body) return; const accounts = crmLoad('accounts').filter(a => a.status === 'active'); const queue = accounts.filter(a => { const _created = a.created || a.createdAt || 0; const age = _created ? (Date.now()-_created)/86400000 : 999; const ob = a.onboarding || {}; return age <= 90 || !OB_STEPS.every(s => ob[s.key]); }).sort((a,b) => (b.created||0)-(a.created||0)); if (!queue.length) { body.innerHTML='
✅ All recent accounts are fully onboarded.
'; return; } body.innerHTML = queue.map(a => { const ob = a.onboarding||{}, done=OB_STEPS.filter(s=>ob[s.key]).length, pct=Math.round(done/OB_STEPS.length*100); const barColor = pct===100?'#1E7B3C':pct>=50?'#D97706':'#C8102E'; const ageDays = (a.created||a.createdAt) ? Math.floor((Date.now()-(a.created||a.createdAt))/86400000) : '?'; return `
${escH(a.name||a.business||'')}
${escH(a.address||'')} · Added ${ageDays}d ago · Rep: ${escH(a.assignedRep||a.rep||'Unassigned')}
${pct}%
${done}/${OB_STEPS.length} steps
${OB_STEPS.map(s => { const isDone=!!ob[s.key]; return ''; }).join('')}
`; }).join(''); } function opsToggleOnboarding(accountId, stepKey) { const data=crmLoad('accounts'), a=data.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return; if(!a.onboarding) a.onboarding={}; a.onboarding[stepKey] = a.onboarding[stepKey] ? null : new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); crmSave('accounts',data); opsRenderOnboardingQueue(); } // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ // COMPLIANCE CERTIFICATE TRACKER // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ function opsRenderCertTracker() { const body=document.getElementById('opsCertBody'); if(!body) return; const today=new Date(); today.setHours(0,0,0,0); const rows=crmLoad('accounts').filter(a=>a.status==='active' && (a.services||[]).some(s=>['unipro','quality3','UniPro','Quality III','Quality3'].includes(s))).map(a => { const cert=a.certStatus||{}; const expiry=cert.expiryDate?new Date(cert.expiryDate):null; const daysToExpiry=expiry?Math.floor((expiry-today)/86400000):null; return {a,cert,daysToExpiry}; }); rows.sort((x,y)=>(x.daysToExpiry??999)-(y.daysToExpiry??999)); if(!rows.length){body.innerHTML='
No active fire protection accounts found.
';return;} body.innerHTML=rows.map(({a,cert,daysToExpiry})=>{ let statusLabel='No Cert',statusColor='#991B1B',statusBg='#FEE2E2'; if(cert.pendingAHJ){statusLabel='Pending AHJ';statusColor='#6B21A8';statusBg='#F3E8FF';} else if(cert.issuedDate&&daysToExpiry===null){statusLabel='Issued';statusColor='#1E40AF';statusBg='#DBEAFE';} else if(daysToExpiry!==null&&daysToExpiry<0){statusLabel='EXPIRED';statusColor='#991B1B';statusBg='#FEE2E2';} else if(daysToExpiry!==null&&daysToExpiry<=30){statusLabel='Exp '+daysToExpiry+'d';statusColor='#C8102E';statusBg='#FEE2E2';} else if(daysToExpiry!==null&&daysToExpiry<=90){statusLabel='Exp '+daysToExpiry+'d';statusColor='#D97706';statusBg='#FEF3C7';} else if(daysToExpiry!==null){statusLabel='Valid '+daysToExpiry+'d';statusColor='#1E7B3C';statusBg='#DCFCE7';} return '
' +'
'+escH(a.name||a.business||'')+'
'+escH(a.address||'')+' · '+escH(a.assignedRep||a.rep||'')+'
' +'
'+statusLabel+'
' +'
'+(cert.issuedDate||'—')+'
' +'
'+(cert.expiryDate||'—')+'
' +'
' +'' +'' +'' +'
'; }).join(''); } function opsCertIssue(accountId) { const exp=prompt('Cert expiry (YYYY-MM-DD) or leave blank:'); const data=crmLoad('accounts'),a=data.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return; a.certStatus={...(a.certStatus||{}),issuedDate:new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10),expiryDate:exp||null,pendingAHJ:false}; crmSave('accounts',data); opsRenderCertTracker(); } function opsCertAHJ(accountId) { const data=crmLoad('accounts'),a=data.find(x=>x.id===accountId); if(!a) return; a.certStatus={...(a.certStatus||{}),pendingAHJ:!(a.certStatus?.pendingAHJ)}; crmSave('accounts',data); opsRenderCertTracker(); } /* ── ACCEPT / DECLINE ── */ function estAccept(){ estState.decision = 'accepted'; document.getElementById('estDecision').classList.remove('open'); // Show signature panel first const sigPanel = document.getElementById('estSigPanel'); if (sigPanel) { sigPanel.style.display = 'block'; sigPanel.scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth', block:'start' }); // Set today's date const dateEl = document.getElementById('est_sigDate'); if (dateEl && !dateEl.value) dateEl.value = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; // Initialize canvas estInitSigCanvas(); // Pre-fill name from account const nameEl = document.getElementById('est_sigName'); const titleEl = document.getElementById('est_sigTitle'); if (estState.accountId) { const r = crmLoad('accounts').find(x => x.id === estState.accountId); if (r) { if (nameEl && !nameEl.value) nameEl.value = r.contact || r.name || ''; if (titleEl && !titleEl.value && r.role) { titleEl.value = r.role === 'Other' && r.roleCustom ? r.roleCustom : r.role; } } } } else { // fallback if sig panel missing estShowSquarePanel(); } } function estShowSquarePanel(){ const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x=>x.id===estState.accountId); if(r){ r.status='active'; r.estimateAccepted=true; r.estimateDate=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; crmSave('accounts',data); } document.getElementById('estSquarePanel').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('estSquarePanel').scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); } // ── ESTIMATE SIGNATURE CANVAS ────────────────────────────────────────────── let _estSigCtx = null, _estSigDown = false, _estSigned = false; function estInitSigCanvas() { const canvas = document.getElementById('est_sigCanvas'); if (!canvas) return; const placeholder = document.getElementById('est_sigPlaceholder'); const w = canvas.parentElement.offsetWidth || 500; canvas.width = w; canvas.height = 140; _estSigCtx = canvas.getContext('2d'); _estSigCtx.strokeStyle = '#1A1D21'; _estSigCtx.lineWidth = 2.2; _estSigCtx.lineCap = 'round'; _estSigCtx.lineJoin = 'round'; _estSigned = false; // Remove old listeners by cloning const fresh = canvas.cloneNode(false); canvas.parentNode.replaceChild(fresh, canvas); _estSigCtx = fresh.getContext('2d'); _estSigCtx.strokeStyle = '#1A1D21'; _estSigCtx.lineWidth = 2.2; _estSigCtx.lineCap = 'round'; _estSigCtx.lineJoin = 'round'; const getPos = (e) => { const rect = fresh.getBoundingClientRect(); const scaleX = fresh.width / rect.width; const scaleY = fresh.height / rect.height; const src = e.touches ? e.touches[0] : e; return { x: (src.clientX - rect.left) * scaleX, y: (src.clientY - rect.top) * scaleY }; }; fresh.addEventListener('mousedown', (e) => { _estSigDown=true; const p=getPos(e); _estSigCtx.beginPath(); _estSigCtx.moveTo(p.x,p.y); if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display='none'; }); fresh.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => { if(!_estSigDown) return; const p=getPos(e); _estSigCtx.lineTo(p.x,p.y); _estSigCtx.stroke(); }); fresh.addEventListener('mouseup', () => { _estSigDown=false; _estSigned=true; }); fresh.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => { _estSigDown=false; }); fresh.addEventListener('touchstart', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); _estSigDown=true; const p=getPos(e); _estSigCtx.beginPath(); _estSigCtx.moveTo(p.x,p.y); if(placeholder) placeholder.style.display='none'; }, {passive:false}); fresh.addEventListener('touchmove', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); if(!_estSigDown) return; const p=getPos(e); _estSigCtx.lineTo(p.x,p.y); _estSigCtx.stroke(); }, {passive:false}); fresh.addEventListener('touchend', () => { _estSigDown=false; _estSigned=true; }); } function estGenSig() { const name = document.getElementById('est_sigName')?.value?.trim(); if (!name) { alert('Enter the printed name first.'); return; } const canvas = document.getElementById('est_sigCanvas'); if (!canvas) return; const placeholder = document.getElementById('est_sigPlaceholder'); if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = 'none'; // ensure canvas is sized if (!canvas.width || canvas.width < 100) estInitSigCanvas(); const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); ctx.fillStyle = '#1A1D21'; // Cursive-style font stack ctx.font = `italic ${Math.min(60, canvas.height * 0.45)}px "Brush Script MT", "Segoe Script", cursive`; ctx.textBaseline = 'middle'; ctx.fillText(name, 20, canvas.height / 2); _estSigned = true; } function estClearSig() { const canvas = document.getElementById('est_sigCanvas'); if (!canvas) return; const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d'); ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height); const placeholder = document.getElementById('est_sigPlaceholder'); if (placeholder) placeholder.style.display = 'block'; _estSigned = false; } function estSigBack() { document.getElementById('estSigPanel').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('estDecision').classList.add('open'); document.getElementById('estDecision').scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); } function estSigProceed() { const name = document.getElementById('est_sigName')?.value?.trim(); if (!name) { const el = document.getElementById('est_sigName'); if (el) { el.style.borderColor = '#C8102E'; el.focus(); setTimeout(() => el.style.borderColor = '', 2500); } alert('Client printed name is required.'); return; } if (!_estSigned) { alert('Client signature is required. Use "Generate Signature" or draw in the box.'); return; } // Save signature data const canvas = document.getElementById('est_sigCanvas'); const sigDataUrl = canvas ? canvas.toDataURL('image/png') : null; const sigDate = document.getElementById('est_sigDate')?.value || new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; const sigTitle = document.getElementById('est_sigTitle')?.value?.trim() || ''; // Persist to account if (estState.accountId) { const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x => x.id === estState.accountId); if (r) { r.clientSignatureName = name; r.clientSignatureTitle = sigTitle; r.clientSignatureDate = sigDate; if (sigDataUrl) r.clientSignatureData = sigDataUrl; r.status = 'active'; r.estimateAccepted = true; r.estimateDate = sigDate; crmSave('accounts', data); } } document.getElementById('estSigPanel').style.display = 'none'; estShowSquarePanel(); } function estDecline(){ estState.decision = 'thinking'; document.getElementById('estDecision').classList.remove('open'); document.getElementById('estThinkingPanel').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('estThinkingPanel').scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); } function estDeclineFull(){ estState.decision = 'declined'; document.getElementById('estDecision').classList.remove('open'); document.getElementById('estNotInterestedPanel').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('estNotInterestedPanel').scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); } function estPaymentDone(){ document.getElementById('estSquarePanel').style.display = 'none'; document.getElementById('estOnboard').classList.add('open'); document.getElementById('estOnboard').scrollIntoView({ behavior:'smooth' }); // Pre-fill onboarding from account const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x=>x.id===estState.accountId); if(r){ document.getElementById('ob_contact').value = r.contact || r.name || ''; document.getElementById('ob_phone').value = r.phone || ''; document.getElementById('ob_email').value = r.email || ''; } document.getElementById('ob_chk1').checked = true; document.getElementById('ob_chk2').checked = true; } function estSendThinkingEmail(){ const email = document.getElementById('estThinkingEmail').value.trim(); if(!email){ alert('Enter customer email address.'); return; } const subject = encodeURIComponent(`Termac Estimate — ${estState.bizName}`); const body = encodeURIComponent(`Hi,\n\nGreat to meet you today! As promised, here's your estimate.\n\nTake a look and feel free to reach out with any questions — I'm happy to walk through it with you.\n\nTed Scholl\ntscholl@termac.com | 267-421-6336`); window.open(`mailto:${email}?subject=${subject}&body=${body}`, '_blank'); document.getElementById('estThinkingStatus').textContent = '✅ Email opened — attach the PDF before sending.'; document.getElementById('estThinkingStatus').style.display = 'block'; document.getElementById('estThinkingStatus').style.color = '#1E7B3C'; // Update account const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x=>x.id===estState.accountId); if(r){ r.status='inactive'; r.followupDate=new Date(Date.now()+86400000*3).toISOString().split('T')[0]; crmSave('accounts',data); } } function estLogDecline(){ const reason = document.getElementById('estDeclineReason').value; if(!reason){ alert('Please select a reason.'); return; } const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x=>x.id===estState.accountId); if(r){ r.status='inactive'; r.declineReason=reason; r.declineDate=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; crmSave('accounts',data); } alert(`Logged: ${reason}\n\nAccount marked inactive. Follow-up at your discretion.`); estClose(); svClose(); renderCRMView(); } function obSave(){ const data = crmLoad('accounts'); const r = data.find(x=>x.id===estState.accountId); if(r){ r.accountNumber = document.getElementById('ob_account_num').value.trim(); r.contact = document.getElementById('ob_contact').value.trim() || r.contact; r.phone = document.getElementById('ob_phone').value.trim() || r.phone; r.email = document.getElementById('ob_email').value.trim() || r.email; r.serviceDay = document.getElementById('ob_service_day').value.trim(); r.officeNotes = document.getElementById('ob_notes').value.trim(); r.onboarded = true; crmSave('accounts', data); } alert('✅ Onboarding info saved to account record.\n\nOffice will set service start dates and finalize setup.'); estClose(); svClose(); renderCRMView(); }

Harvested Sources — Greater Philadelphia Region
ℹ️ Public bid sites generally don't offer a direct data feed — most require a free supplier registration to view full solicitation detail. For sites we're not yet registered on, postings can be pasted in manually and AI will still scope, price, and track them the same way.

📡 Lead Sources — Full Territory

Every verified-live source was fetched directly with real data confirmed — not assumed. 🟡 sources are confirmed-live official platforms, not yet row-tested. Some require free registration or a paid subscription before you can pull data — see the badge on each.

🔍 Orphaned Customers — No Rep Assigned

Accounts with no rep on file — usually a vacated territory or a customer that came in before a rep was assigned. Assign Permanently if this is the account's real long-term rep, or Temporarily if someone's just covering until a rep is hired for that area — temporary assignments stay flagged on the account so they're easy to revisit later.

🔍 Duplicate Finder — Call List & Leads

Read-only scan — nothing is deleted until you choose to merge a group or remove an overlap below. Matches on business name + ZIP (the same key the harvest/import dedup already uses) and separately on phone number, which catches name variants like "Tony's Pizza" vs. "Tony's Pizza LLC" at the same number. Merging keeps whichever record you pick and folds the others' call/activity history into it before deleting them — nothing gets silently lost.

Your AI coach analyzes your real CRM activity, close rates, pipeline velocity, and patterns — then gives you specific, honest, motivating feedback. The more you use the platform, the smarter it gets.

📅 Weekly Activity Report
Sent every Friday EOD to management. Complete the questionnaire below — it auto-compiles with your CRM activity data into one clean email.

🧠 Your AI Coach — Weekly Insight
Your personalized coaching note generates from your real CRM data — hits, patterns, what to push next week. Click Generate to build it.
Send To
Primary: Tom Pittakas · Failsafe (vacation coverage): Jim Kennedy, Dennis Muracco
📋 Sent Reports Log
Confirms when you clicked Send and which week/recipients it went to. This logs the moment your mail app opened with the report — it can't see whether you clicked Send inside Outlook itself, so always double-check your Sent folder for anything important.

📷 Scan Inspection Tag

Snap the competitor's tag, dictate or type the address, save — it drops straight into the Leads pool assigned to you, with a follow-up reminder set 60 days before the inspection comes due.
